## Goal
What is the high-level goal this epic is working towards?

## Background / Context
Why is this work needed? Any relevant links, prior art, or decisions.

## Tasks
List the individual tasks/sub-issues that make up this epic. The agent will automatically create GitHub issues for any unchecked items and replace them with issue links.

## Acceptance Criteria
How do we know this epic is complete?
